title: ERCOT AS Demand Curves DAM And SCED CSV download
description:
Ancillary Service Demand Curves (ASDCs) for all hours in ERCOT, used by both DAM and SCED in the procurement of ancillary services and to determine the Market Clearing Prices for Capacity (MCPCs). The ASDCs are related to the elimination of the pre-RTC+B ORDC price adders and the new adder price determination process.

Implemented on December 5th, 2025, as part of ERCOT's RTC+B project.
